title: RTS Siege of Settlements
description: Community edition of RTS Reign of Nether by solegendary
body:
# RTS Siege of Settlements

![Example of a settlement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ba4471af3a4a15c24b22f97b6ad3dca957dcd0_0.webp)

Siege of Settlemts is a fan-made expansion for the Reign of Nether mod in Minecraft.

This mod expands the RTS gameplay by adding new buildings, research upgrades, mechanics, and balance changes. It aims to provide more strategic options, improve base development, and add new ways to strengthen your army and defenses.

Features include:

\- RTS gameplay

\- Defense against monster armies

\- Balanced economy

**⚠️ WARNING ⚠️**

\- It is recommended to play in wave mode.

\- You can only play as a villagers faction.

\- It is recommended to play in survival mode.

\- You cannot break any blocks except specific ones.

## How do you play this?

1.  Install Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
2.  Download this mod
3.  Download GeckoLib
4.  Without extracting, move it to .minecraft/mods
5.  Launch the game without the original Reign of Nether!
6.  Create a new world in Survival mode


Siege of Settlements is an unofficial fan project and is not affiliated with the original mod developers.

[Download original mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/reign-of-nether-rts)
